title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
